about: Undergraduate ECE student at the National Technical University of Athens. Focus on algorithms, complexity, and quantum computing. Experienced in C++ and MATLAB with strong mathematics and programming background. Active member of the IEEE NTUA Student Branch Computer Society. Aspiring to pursue an academic research career in quantum algorithms and computational complexity.

items.title: National Technical University of Athens (NTUA)
items.subtitle: Diploma in Electrical and Computer Engineering | Integrated Master's
items.description: GPA: 8.9 / 10 | Algorithms & Complexity, Computability & Complexity, Discrete Mathematics, FoCS

items.title: Robot Search and Evacuation Problem
items.subtitle: Computational Geometry | Communication Complexity
details: Improving complexity bounds for the search and evacuation problem of robots on a unit disk
Learned how to apply MATLAB code for numerical method proofs

items.title: Randomized Decision Tree Complexity for Recursive Majority Decision Trees
items.subtitle: Decision Trees | Computational Complexity
details: Developing a randomized algorithm to evaluate a recursive majority decision tree
Created simulations in C++ and Python

items.title: Woundy: 3D Wound Scanning & Assessment Device
items.subtitle: Signal Denoising | Biomedical Eng.
details: Designed algorithms for sensor data denoising using MATLAB

items.title: Lower Bounds for Randomized k-Threshold Gate Decision Tree Complexity
items.subtitle: Decision Trees
details: Developed a recursive formula for the randomized decision tree complexity of k-threshold gate decision trees
Derived closed-form expressions for two specific instances of the problem

items.title: Laboratory Teaching Assistant | SoftLab, NTUA
items.description: Guided first-year students in programming fundamentals using C/C++ as part of a paid scholarship program

items.title: Private Tutor
items.description: Tutored students in mathematics, physics, and chemistry, from junior high competitions to national examinations

items.title: Machine Learning Chapter | IEEE NTUA SB Computer Society
items.description: Organized events (AI Lab 2025) to promote the AI fundamentals to fellow students and participated in small scale projects like fine-tuning neural networks for specific tasks.

items.title: Quantum Computing Chapter | IEEE NTUA SB Computer Society
items.description: Active involvement in weekly lectures that introduce quantum computing concepts to fellow students and currently developing a quantum computing event due early April.

items.title: National Physics Competition "Aristotle" · Honorable Mention | NKUA & HPSEe
National Mathematical Olympiad "Archimedes" · 35th & 37th editions | Hellenic Math. Society
